CVE-2023-1596.title: The tagDiv Composer WordPress plugin before 4.0 does not sanitise ...
CVE-2023-1596.description: The tagDiv Composer WordPress plugin before 4.0 does not sanitise and escape a parameter before outputting it back in the page, leading to a Reflected Cross-Site Scripting which could be used against high privilege users such as admin
